name: DimensionLinear
summary: The DimensionLinear class represents linear dimensions.

properties.name: aligned_text_position
properties.summary: The #aligned_text_position method returns the text position for dimensions with aligned text (i.
properties.remarks: The #aligned_text_position method returns the text position for dimensions with aligned text (i.e. has_aligned_text? returns true). Valid values are class constants: ALIGNED_TEXT_ABOVE ALIGNED_TEXT_CENTER ALIGNED_TEXT_OUTSIDE

properties.name: end
properties.summary: The end method returns the point or entity the dimension is referencing at its end.
properties.remarks: The end method returns the point or entity the dimension is referencing at its end.

properties.name: end_attached_to
properties.summary: The #end_attached_to method will return the attached end point via an array containing the InstancePath and Geom::Point3d.
properties.remarks: The #end_attached_to method will return the attached end point via an array containing the InstancePath and Geom::Point3d.

properties.name: offset_vector
properties.summary: The offset_vector method returns the parallel offset vector from the reference line to the dimension line measured from the 'start' reference point.
properties.remarks: The offset_vector method returns the parallel offset vector from the reference line to the dimension line measured from the 'start' reference point.

properties.name: start
properties.summary: The start method returns the point or entity the dimension is referencing at its start.
properties.remarks: The start method returns the point or entity the dimension is referencing at its start.

properties.name: start_attached_to
properties.summary: The #start_attached_to method will return the attached start point via an array containing the InstancePath and Geom::Point3d.
properties.remarks: The #start_attached_to method will return the attached start point via an array containing the InstancePath and Geom::Point3d.

properties.name: text_position
properties.summary: The #text_position method returns the position of the text along the dimension line.
properties.remarks: The #text_position method returns the position of the text along the dimension line. Valid values are class constants: TEXT_OUTSIDE_START TEXT_CENTERED TEXT_OUTSIDE_END
